benefits.description: Works on brain to produce libido and sexual effects

side_effects.description: Significant nausea in some users, preventing further use
Rebound effect with zero interest for a week or more after discontinuation if used more frequently

protocol_notes: Takes 4-6 hours to take effect; peak effect first 12 hours with tapering over 36-48 hours. Tolerance builds quickly. Injection route only; nasal form reportedly does not work. Recommends low starting doses and limiting frequency to 1-2 times per month to avoid rebound effects. States that frequent daily use would cause dopamine response alterations and normal mood dysregulation.
